text:
I spent 2 hours setting up a Threads account. It has done more work in the last month than I did in the previous year.

It reads its own analytics, rewrites posts based on what performed, and publishes daily. All via the official Meta API and free tools. No subscriptions. No logins. It just compounds.

You set your voice once. The system learns the rest.

Link in bio if you want your account to run itself
